[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Yorvin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Police officer/Legends|deputy]] to [[Siron Tawaler]] in the [[Toryaz Station]] [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|security force]] as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. After Tawaler [[Death/Legends|died]], she took over as head of security and was given orders as to what she should do by [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]].

Yorvin had hair a darker shade of red than that of [[Mara Jade Skywalker]].
